name: Zywave Insurance Distribution Technology API
what_it_does: Zywave insurance distribution technology REST API for insurance agency management, employee benefits administration, carrier connectivity, and risk management content for P&C and employee benefits insurance distributors. Enables AI agents to manage client and prospect management for insurance agency CRM automation, handle employee benefits enrollment and administration workflow for HR benefits platform integration, access carrier connectivity and real-time quoting for commercial insurance placement automation, retrieve risk management content and compliance documents for client-facing insurance advisory automation, manage agency revenue and commission reporting for insurance distributor financial automation, handle certificate of insurance generation and tracking for COI management automation, access employee benefits benchmarking and analytics for client advisory automation, retrieve OSHA and risk control content for client risk management automation, manage COBRA and benefits compliance notifications for employer benefits administration automation, and integrate Zywave with Applied Epic, Vertafore AMS360, and employer HRIS platforms for end-to-end insurance distribution workflow.
use_cases: Managing insurance clients from agency CRM automation agents
Enrolling employees from benefits administration agents
Generating COIs from certificate management agents
Distributing risk content from advisory automation agents
not_for: Insurance carrier underwriting and policy issuance
best_when: A P&C or employee benefits insurance agency, broker, or MGA wanting AI agents to automate client management, carrier quoting, employee benefits administration, certificate management, and risk advisory content delivery within the Zywave distribution technology ecosystem.
avoid_when: EMPLOYEE BENEFITS PII AND HIPAA ELIGIBILITY DATA: Automated employee benefits administration via Zywave involving employee health enrollment and eligibility data requires HIPAA Business Associate Agreement; automated benefits eligibility data exchange between Zywave and carrier without BAA creates HIPAA violation for broker. CERTIFICATE OF INSURANCE ACCURACY FOR ADDITIONAL INSURED: Automated COI generation via Zywave must verify active policy coverage terms before issuance; automated COI generation reflecting incorrect coverage limits, expiration dates, or additional insured status creates agency E&O liability for misrepresentation of coverage. COBRA NOTIFICATION TIMING COMPLIANCE: Automated COBRA notification via Zywave must deliver initial COBRA notice within 14 days of qualifying event; automated COBRA notification workflow with delay beyond statutory window creates employer ERISA penalty exposure.

auth.notes: Zywave uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Milwaukee, Wisconsin HQ. Founded 2000. Private (Clearlake Capital, TA Associates investors, ~$450M raised). 15,000+ insurance distribution customers. Products include BrokerageBuilder, HR Hotline, DocuBuilder, Proposals+, and carrier connectivity. Employee benefits and P&C insurance distribution technology. Acquired Agency Zoom, Broker Buddha, and other insurtech tools. Competes with Vertafore, Applied Systems, and Ease for insurance distribution technology.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per module (CRM, benefits, COI, content)
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per product module; agency size-based pricing; enterprise pricing for multi-office brokers and MGA
pricing.notes: Milwaukee WI. Private (Clearlake, TA Associates). Founded 2000. 15,000+ insurance distributor customers. Annual subscription per product module. API access in enterprise tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; client management and quoting queries throttled; webhooks for enrollment and COI events

known_agent_gotchas: MULTI-PRODUCT API SURFACE ACROSS ACQUISITIONS: Zywave has grown by acquisition (Agency Zoom CRM, Broker Buddha, DocuBuilder, Proposals+); each acquired product may have distinct API endpoint, authentication, and data model; automated workflows spanning multiple Zywave products require product-specific API integration; confirm unified API surface vs multi-product API fragmentation with Zywave developer team

HIPAA BAA REQUIRED FOR BENEFITS ELIGIBILITY DATA: Automated employee benefits data exchange via Zywave involving health enrollment and eligibility requires signed HIPAA BAA before API integration; automated benefits eligibility data access without BAA creates HIPAA violation for agency; obtain BAA before building automated benefits enrollment workflows

COI COVERAGE VERIFICATION BEFORE ISSUANCE: Automated COI generation must verify active policy status and coverage terms via carrier data before COI issuance; automated COI generation using cached policy data without real-time carrier verification creates agency E&O risk if policy has lapsed, been cancelled, or terms modified

COBRA NOTIFICATION STATUTORY TIMING: Automated COBRA notification workflow must deliver qualifying event notice within 14-day statutory window; delayed COBRA notification creates ERISA penalty exposure ($110/day per qualified beneficiary); implement real-time COBRA triggering on qualifying event, not batch processing

APPLIED EPIC AND AMS360 SYNC LATENCY: Zywave integrates with Applied Epic and Vertafore AMS360 via API sync; data sync between Zywave and agency management system may have minutes-to-hours latency; automated workflows assuming real-time bidirectional sync between Zywave and AMS may encounter stale client or policy data

BENEFITS ENROLLMENT PERIOD GATING: Automated benefits enrollment via Zywave is restricted to open enrollment and qualifying life event windows; automated enrollment attempts outside enrollment window create enrollment rejection; implement enrollment period validation before automated employee enrollment workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance distribution technology. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Client, employee benefits, and insurance policy data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance distribution. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Client, employee benefits, and agency management data.
